description_long: This coupe car features a classic, vintage design with a two-tone color scheme: a glossy deep burgundy body and a beige roof and hood. The car has a rounded, streamlined silhouette with chrome accents on the bumpers, grille, and around the windows, evoking mid-20th-century automotive styling. The wheels are fitted with whitewall tires and red hubcaps, adding to its retro appeal. The windows are tinted dark, and the car has two main side doors, with a subtle chrome trim running along the sides. The front showcases a prominent chrome grille and dual headlights, while the rear includes a small trunk and classic tail lights. The overall build suggests a sturdy metal frame with glass windows and rubber tires, typical of coupes from this era.
description: A vintage coupe car with a glossy burgundy body, beige roof, chrome accents, and whitewall tires, exuding classic mid-century style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the beige hood, chrome grille, dual headlights, and the car's rounded front profile.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the two-door configuration, dark windows, chrome trim, and whitewall tires with red hubcaps.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the beige trunk, classic tail lights, and chrome rear bumper.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, emphasizing the coupe's streamlined profile and window arrangement.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
